description.plain: A 6.67-inch Full HD 120Hz smartphone with 50MP camera, 8GB RAM, and 256GB storage, supporting dual SIM and 5G connectivity.

unique_selling_points: Combines a large Full HD display with 50MP camera and expandable storage in a compact, dual SIM 5G device.
metadata.top_features:
6.67-inch Full HD 120Hz display delivers smooth, vibrant visuals for everyday use
50MP main camera captures high-resolution photos for better memories
8GB RAM ensures smooth multitasking and app performance
256GB internal storage with expandable option for ample space and flexibility
Dual SIM support (nano SIM and eSIM) for versatile connectivity
metadata.tech_specs:
Display: 6.67 inches, Full HD, 120Hz refresh rate
Internal Storage: 256GB, expandable
RAM: 8GB
Processor: Snapdragon 685
Operating System: Android 14
Battery: 5000mAh
SIM: Dual (nano SIM and eSIM)
Color: Silver

description.plain: Dual-SIM Handy, 6,67 Zoll, Full HD, 120 Hz, 50 MP, 8 GB RAM, 256 GB interner Speicher, Snapdragon 685, Android 14, 5.000 mAh, Speicher erweiterbar
A high-performance 5G smartphone with a 6.79-inch AMOLED display, 8K video, and advanced camera features.

unique_selling_points: Combines a 6.79-inch AMOLED display with 8K video recording and a 120W charging speed in a compact, unlocked device.
metadata.top_features:
6.79-inch AMOLED display delivers vibrant visuals and smooth refresh rates for immersive viewing
8K 30 fps video recording enables ultra-high-definition content creation and capture
120W fast charging ensures rapid power delivery for extended device usage
Dual SIM hybrid support provides flexibility with both physical and eSIM options
Advanced camera system with multiple lenses and 8K video for versatile photography

A 6.67-inch Android 14 smartphone with a high-resolution AMOLED display, dual SIM support, and fast charging.

unique_selling_points: Combines a 120Hz AMOLED display with 50MP dual rear cameras and 67W fast charging in a compact phablet form factor.
metadata.top_features:
120Hz AMOLED display delivers smooth, vibrant visuals for immersive viewing
50MP dual rear cameras with optical image stabilization capture high-quality photos
67W fast charging ensures rapid power replenishment for extended use
Dual SIM support (nano and microSD) provides flexible connectivity options
Front 16MP selfie camera enables easy video calls and social media
metadata.tech_specs:
Display: 6.67-inch, 2400 x 1080 pixels, 120Hz, AMOLED, 395 ppi, 2090 x 1600 ratio
RAM: 8GB
Internal Storage: 5000mAh battery, expandable up to 200GB via microSD
Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 685, Octa-core 2.8GHz
Camera: 1.5MP wide (f/1.9) + 2MP depth sensor (f/2.4), OIS, 3x zoom
Charging: 67W SuperVOOC, USB Type-C
SIM: Dual SIM (nano and microSD)
Weight: 187g

A high-performance 5G smartphone with 5000 mAh battery, 120Hz AMOLED display, and advanced camera system.

unique_selling_points: Combines 5G connectivity, 120Hz AMOLED display, and a 5000 mAh battery in a compact, unlocked device.
metadata.top_features:
5G connectivity enables ultra-fast data speeds for seamless streaming and downloads
5000 mAh battery provides extended usage between charges
120Hz AMOLED display delivers smooth, vibrant visuals
Dual rear cameras with 120Hz ultra high frame rate capture every moment
NFC support allows for contactless payments and smart device integration
metadata.tech_specs:
Battery Capacity: 5000 mAh
Display: 6.7-inch AMOLED, 1080p, 120Hz refresh rate
Processor: Octa-core (4x2.2 GHz Cortex-A78, 4x1.8 GHz Cortex-A55), Snapdragon 6 Gen 1, 4 nm
RAM: 8GB or 12GB
Storage: 256GB or 512GB
Camera: Dual rear (50MP main, 26mm wide, 20MP telephoto, 12MP ultra wide), 120Hz ultra high frame rate
SIM: Dual Nano SIM
Expandable Storage: microSD, microSDHC, microSDXC
Operating System: Android 14

description.plain: პროდუქტის არწერა: ბრენდი: Realme - რეალმე მოდელი: 12 Pro+ ბატარეის მოცულობა: 5000 mAh USB Type-C: დიახ AUX პორტი: არა 5G: დიახ საოპერაციო სისტემა: Android OS 14 სიმ ბარათის ტიპი: Nano SIM (2 ბარათიანი) ზომა: 16.2*7.4*0.9 სმ წონა: 0.2 კგ ეკრანი: დიაგონალი: 6.7 ინჩი (17 სმ) გაფართოება: 1080*2412 პანელის ტიპი: AMOLED ფორმატი: 20:9 განახლების სიხშირე: 120 Hz სიკაშკაშე: 950 Nots კამერა: რაოდენობა: 3 მთავარი: 50 MP, f/1.8, 26mm (wide), 1/2.0, PDAF, OIS მე-2: 32 MP, f/2.0, 47mm (telephoto), 1/2.75, PDAF, OIS, 2x optical zoom მე-3: 8 MP, f/2.2, 16mm, 112˚ (ultrawide), 1/4.0, 1.12µm ვიდეოს გარჩევადობა: 4K@30fps, 1080p@30/60/120fps, gyro-EIS სელფის კამერა: 16 MP, f/2.4, 24mm (wide), 1.0µm სელფის კამერის გარჩევადობა: 1080p@30fps ნათება: დიახ HDR: დიახ პანორამას ფუნქცია პროცესორი: მოდელი: Octa-core (4x2.2 GHz Cortex-A78 & 4x1.8 GHz Cortex-A55) ტიპი: Snapdragon 6 Gen 1 (4 nm) გრაფიკული პროცესორის ტიპი: Adreno 710 ინტეგრირებული გრაფიკული ბარათი მეხსიერება და სენსორები: ოპერაციული მეხსიერება: 8GB / 12GB შიდა მეხსიერება: 256GB / 512GB ჩიპსეტის მხარდაჭერა: არა ანაბეჭდი: დიახ NFC: დიახ

A high-performance Android smartphone with 5G support, dual SIM, and a large AMOLED display.

unique_selling_points: Combines a 6.77-inch AMOLED display with 5G connectivity and dual SIM capability in a compact, high-capacity design.
metadata.top_features:
6.77-inch AMOLED display delivers vibrant visuals and smooth scrolling
5G, 4G, 3G, and 2G network support ensures fast and reliable connectivity
Dual SIM hybrid (nano SIM and eSIM) for flexible device compatibility
12 GB RAM and 256 GB storage provide ample performance and storage
45W fast charging enables quick power replenishment

description.plain: A high-performance 5G smartphone with 8GB RAM and 256GB storage in a Navigator Beige color.
High-performance Android smartphone with 12GB RAM, 256GB storage, and 165Hz Full HD display.

unique_selling_points: Combines a Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processor with a 200MP 165Hz Full HD display and 12GB RAM for top-tier performance.
metadata.top_features:
Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processor delivers exceptional speed and multitasking for demanding tasks
200MP 165Hz Full HD display provides ultra-smooth visuals and vibrant colors
12GB RAM ensures fast app switching and responsiveness
256GB internal storage offers ample space for apps, media, and files
Unlocked design supports global carrier flexibility

products.title: Realme GT8 Pro, 12GB+256GB, 6.79 inch Realme UI 7.0 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 Octa Core, NFC, Network: 5G, 12GB+256GB, Realme GT8 Pro, 12GB+256GB

description.plain: A high-performance 5G smartphone with Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, 12GB RAM, and 256GB storage, featuring advanced cameras and real-time biometric security.

unique_selling_points: Combines Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 octa-core processing with 12GB RAM and 256GB storage in a compact, unlocked 5G device.
metadata.top_features:
Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 octa-core processor delivers top-tier speed and efficiency for demanding tasks
12GB LPDDR5X RAM and 256GB internal storage provide ample space for apps and media
50MP main camera with GR OIS and 200MP telephoto enables high-quality photography and zoom
Realme UI 7.0 with NFC and biometric security ensures a secure and user-friendly experience
Dual SIM support (nano SIM and eSIM) offers flexible connectivity options
metadata.tech_specs:
Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, 3nm, up to 4.60GHz octa-core
RAM: 12GB LPDDR5X
Internal Storage: 256GB
Display: 6.79 inch QHD+ AMOLED, 1440 x 3136 pixels, 508 ppi
Camera: 50MP main, 50MP ultra wide, 200MP telephoto (OIS, f/2.6), 32MP front
Battery: 7000mAh, 120W fast charging, Type-C
SIM: Dual SIM (nano SIM and eSIM), supports 5G, 4G, 3G, 2G
Biometrics: Ultrasonic under-screen fingerprint, facial recognition

media.alt_text: Realme GT8 Pro, 12GB+256GB, 6.79 inch Realme UI 7.0 Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 Octa Core, NFC, Network: 5G, 12GB+256GB, Realme GT8 Pro, 12GB+256GB

description.plain: Specification 1. CPU: Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5, octa core, 3nm, up to 4.60GHz 2. GPU: Adreno 840 3. RAM + ROM: 12GB + 256GB / LPDDR5X + UFS 4.1 4. Extended storage: Not support 5. System: Realme UI 7.0 6. NFC: Supports reading and writing NFC cards (13.56MHz NFC cards), supports NFC-SIM (SIM1 card slot only), supports HCE payment, supports eSE (supports subway and bus rides in 300+ cities, supports realme Pay, access cards, car keys, and citizen electronic identity (eID) and other functions. A simple touch enables convenient access and secure payments.) 7. SIM card type: Nano-SIM card, Nano-USIM card, Dual SIM Dual Standby Dual Active (Dual Active supported on some RAT/bands) 8. Sensor: Proximity sensor, ambient light sensor, color temperature sensor, electronic compass, accelerometer, gyroscope, Hall sensor 9. Languages: Arabic, Bengali, Burmese, Czech, French, English, Filipino, Hindi, Indonesian, Japanese, Khmer, Malay, Turkish, Thai, Vietnamese, Traditional Chinese, Nepali, Lao, Kor., Tibetan, Uyghur 10. Biometrics: Support ultrasonic under-screen fingerprint recognition, facial recognition 11. Dimensions: 161.80 x 76.87 x 8.20-8.30mm 12. Weight: About 214-218g Screen Display: 1. Size: 6.79 inch, AMOLED, 144Hz 2. Resolution: QHD+ 1440 x 3136 pixels, 508 PPI Camera: 1. Rear Camera: 50MP main camera (GR, OIS, f/1.8) + 50MP ultra-wide-angle camera (f/2.0 aperture) + 200MP telephoto camera (OIS, f/2.6) 2. Front Camera: 32MP (f/2.4) Battery: 1. WLAN: Wi-Fi 7 (802.11be), Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax), Wi-Fi 5 (802.11ac), 802.11a/b/g/n, Wi-Fi Display, WLAN network sharing, supports network overlay: Wi-Fi 2.4GHz 2x2 + Wi-Fi 5GHz 2x2 concurrent, Wi-Fi 5GHz 160MHz, 2x2 MIMO 2. Bluetooth: V6.0 3. Headphone and data interface: Type-C 4. Positioning functions: Beidou (B1I+B1C+B2a), GPS (L1+L5), GLONASS (G1), Galileo (E1+E5a), QZSS (L1+L5) Package List 1. Phone x 1 2.
